entry.title: 利用 SAP 的企业自动化处理雇用到退休流程
entry.content:
本文为翻译文，原文链接Leverage Enterprise Automation with SAP for Hire-to-Retire processes，原文作者Manuel_Namyslo。

简介

在不断变化的劳动力管理环境中，“从雇佣到退休”的概念已成为一种超越传统招聘流程的变革性方法。雇用到退休包含全面的战略框架，强调员工在组织内的整个旅程，从初始雇用阶段到最终退休。还可以按以下步骤进行汇总：

从雇佣到退休的理念不仅仅是一个人力资源流行词；这是一种整体的人才管理方法，它凸显了员工职业生涯的每个阶段在组织中的重要性。通过专注于招聘、持续学习、绩效管理、员工幸福感和无缝的退休过渡，企业能够打造一支灵活且富有韧性的员工队伍，在不断变化的业务环境中实现持续成功。为了确保这一持续成功，每个组织都需要提供顺畅的人力资源流程，以避免常见的难题：

 

  • 招聘流程效率低下
  • 入职体验不佳
  • 缺少持续学习机会
  • 绩效管理效率低下
  • 员工敬业度有限
  • 继任计划不足
  • 忽视员工幸福感
  • 退休过渡面临的挑战
  • 技术和数据管理不足

 

在本博文中，我想向您展示如何利用企业自动化来克服雇用到退休领域的低效流程、重复性任务和不良的流程管理。但首先，什么是 SAP 的企业自动化？

 

什么是企业自动化？

借助 SAP 的企业自动化功能，我们的客户能够利用 SAP Integration Suite、SAP Signavio 和 SAP Build 等一流的工具，快速、轻松地洞察业务流程，并利用合适的工具实现自动化，实现出色的业务成果。这些工具与现有业务应用程序无缝协作，不会增加复杂性：

 

  • SAP Integration Suite 是一款集成平台即服务 (iPaaS)，具有数千个与 SAP 和非 SAP 应用程序的预构建集成、API 和连接器。它降低了企业预置和多云环境的复杂性，可帮助您实现优化的端到端业务流程。

 

  • SAP Signavio 提供基于 200,000 个行业基准和最佳实践的业务流程可见性、潜在瓶颈、根本原因分析以及改进建议。深入了解效率低下有助于组织优化和自动化流程。

 

  • SAP Build 是一款低代码解决方案，可以轻松拖放创建自动化和应用。它包括面向 SAP 和非 SAP 系统的预构建自动化和连接器。业务专家可以使用 SAP Build 快速解决流程低效问题。

 

 

雇用到退休的预构建内容：

从 SAP 的企业自动化开始的最简单方法是使用预构建内容。预构建内容提供技术部件，您可以实施这些部件，以及直接来自 SAP 开发团队和合作伙伴的最佳实践和建议。您可以在此处找到我们的内容：

SAP Build – 预构建内容

在此，您可以找到一些专为优化雇用到退休而设计的内容示例：

录用通知书分发 – SuccessFactors

SAP ECC 监控和健康检查

授权推出机器人

职位需求的创建和审批

创建社会保障证书

合同员工结束日期扩展

筛选问题 (API) - SuccessFactors

EC 工作流自动化 – SuccessFactors

面向 SAP SuccessFactors 中电子分离的流程自动化包

重复简历标识的流程自动化

生成离职员工清单（使用 SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central）(4P4)

列出离职员工的未完成活动 (4JF)

工作录用通知审批

 

将此内容转化成您的优势，因为它不仅为您提供可在 SAP Build Lobby 中部署的技术部件，还为您提供来自开发团队和合作伙伴且经认证可上载 SAP Build 内容的建议和最佳实践。此外，我们还确保定期更新和维护内容。

 

用例

 

下一步，我们要跳转到一个实用的方案，向您展示如何将企业自动化用于雇用到退休。在任何企业中，入职流程都是一项至关重要的活动，会影响新员工的体验和成功。我个人是 sap 的工作学生，每隔 6 个月轮流到新部门。因此，我经常面对入职流程，需要新的培训和系统访问权限来支持团队。通过这种体验，我可以说，如果不正确，入职流程可能涉及手动和重复性任务，从而导致低效和延迟。因此，企业需要一款能够实现无缝集成、流程自动化和定制的解决方案，为新员工提供个性化的入职体验。


SAP Integration Suite 与 SAP Build Process Automation 和 SAP Signavio 相结合，提供了全面的解决方案来解决入职流程中的挑战。通过利用基于事件的集成模式、低代码/无代码工作流以及 Business Technology Platform 的强大功能，企业能够扩展和定制登录体验，与第三方工具集成，自动化活动并简化共享服务流程。

 

作为第一步，我们建议使用 SAP Signavio Process Insights 评估新员工的内部入职流程，并确定低效的流程步骤。

瓶颈和手动任务会导致新员工和 HR 业务伙伴的用户体验不满意。

 

在 SAP Signavio Process Intelligence 中，您可以执行根本原因分析以分析入职流程中容易出错且可能导致较长周期的各种步骤。

其中包括为新员工提供合适的设备、分配必要的培训以及负责系统对各种软件组件的访问。

 

利用 SAP Integration Suite 利用基于事件的通信主动启动流程自动化。

您可以启用应用程序、集成和扩展以通过业务事件异步通信 - 在本例中是 SAP SuccessFactors。

我们可以订阅业务事件，以便在新员工进入系统后收到通知。在消息传递代理中，您可以查看租用来自 SAP SuccessFactors 的业务事件的队列。现在，每次生成新录用员工时，都会注意到这一点，并触发了预定义的自动活动。 

 

在下一步中，我们将根据业务规则和决策表自动触发新流程，以识别正确的培训分配和设备。为此，我们可以利用 SAP Build Process Automation 的 LCNC 设计时间。

我们可以通过消息传递代理与来自 SAP SuccessFactors 的上下文数据进行交互。 

 

 

通过嵌入式决策功能，您可以将业务逻辑应用于流程。 

在此，它用于确定根据工作角色适用的培训和设备。 可以轻松地对此进行定制，例如添加附加参数或数学运算符。

 

HR 业务伙伴在 我的收件箱 应用程序中接收此任务，并且可以在一个位置审核所有相关数据。他们可以发表评论并批准或拒绝表单，以便进行人工干预。 

批准此流程后，我们可以将数据处理回 SAP SuccessFactors。

 

我们还可以利用自定义集成流连接到第三方应用程序，并将适配器用于多个通信协议。

在此，我们在 SAP Ariba 中生成采购申请，以确保正确的设备在工作第一天可用。

 

因此，在 SAP Ariba 中生成采购申请，并且已在 SAP Service Cloud 中为 IT 管理员维护 IT 消息。

 

结论

 

Enterprise Automation 目前是 SAP 的最热门主题，它允许您在异构环境中集成应用程序、发现低效环节和自动化流程。投资这项计划必将带来长期的业务成果，并采用完善的方法自动运行和管理企业内部的自动化流程。

这只是如何在雇用到退休上下文中使用这些技术的示例。请记住，此框架具有高度适应性，可用于任何业务范围、行业或用例。因此，请务必查看我们的其他资料、赋能和文档，开启 SAP 企业自动化之旅：

 

  • 请访问 sap.com/enterprise-automation
  • 查看 SAP Build Store 中的预构建集成和自动化内容
  • 查看《教程导航器》中的“实践”材料和说明

 

当然，如果你想快速开启低代码开发之旅，加入我们的 SAP Builders 社区，开始学习 SAP Build 解决方案！

entry.title: 利用SAP 企业自动化处理寻源到付款流程
entry.content:
本文为翻译文，原文链接Leverage Enterprise Automation with SAP for Source-to-Pay processes，原文作者Manuel_Namyslo。

 

简介

寻源到付款世界是全球企业采购和财务管理领域的基石。从确定采购需求到最终向供应商付款这一全面的流程，在优化效率、降低成本和确保合规性方面发挥着关键作用。寻源到付款流程的重要性是多方面的，包括完成以下操作的多个步骤：

 

最后，寻源到付款流程是现代企业成功的关键。它超越了交易效率，包括战略寻源、风险管理、合规和财务控制。通过实施数字化转型并利用先进的寻源到付款解决方案，企业不仅能够实现采购目标，还能在不断变化的业务环境中推动可持续的业务增长和竞争优势。许多企业在寻源到付款流程中面临以下难题：

 

  • 手动流程，缺乏自动化
  • 数据质量低下，可视性差
  • 分散的系统和数据孤岛
  • 供应商关系管理不善
  • 复杂的审批流程
  • 独立采购           
  • 有限的支出可视性
  • 无效的供应商授权
  • 发票差异
  • 缺乏战略寻源

 

现在，我们将了解如何利用企业自动化来克服寻源到付款流程中的这些挑战，并确保流程顺畅且高度自动化。但首先，什么是 SAP 的企业自动化？

 

什么是企业自动化？

借助 SAP 的企业自动化功能，我们的客户能够利用 SAP Integration Suite、SAP Signavio 和 SAP Build 等一流的工具，快速、轻松地洞察业务流程，并利用合适的工具实现自动化，实现出色的业务成果。这些工具与现有业务应用程序无缝协作，不会增加复杂性。

  • SAP Integration Suite 是一款集成平台即服务 (iPaaS)，具有数千个与 SAP 和非 SAP 应用程序的预构建集成、API 和连接器。它降低了企业预置和多云环境的复杂性，可帮助您实现优化的端到端业务流程。

 

  • SAP Signavio 提供基于 200,000 个行业基准和最佳实践的业务流程可见性、潜在瓶颈、根本原因分析以及改进建议。深入了解效率低下有助于组织优化和自动化流程。

 

  • SAP Build 是一款低代码解决方案，可以轻松拖放创建自动化和应用。它包括面向 SAP 和非 SAP 系统的预构建自动化和连接器。业务专家可以使用 SAP Build 快速解决流程低效问题。

 

 

寻源到付款的预构建内容：

从 SAP 的企业自动化开始的最简单方法是使用预构建内容。内容提供技术部件，您可以实施这些部件，以及直接来自 SAP 开发团队和合作伙伴的最佳实践和建议。您可以在此处找到我们的内容：

SAP Build – 预构建内容

在这里，您可以找到一些专为优化寻源到付款而设计的内容示例：

创建采购申请 (BAPI)

通过 Excel 创建采购申请

从电子邮件提取供应商发票文件并上载到 SAP Central Invoice Management

创建开票凭证 - VF01 (ECC) Cloud Studio

Ariba 采购申请审批

物料 BOM 更改 - CS02 (ECC)

收货采购订单 - ECC (MIGO)

收货检验批次供应商谈判

采购申请抬头审批和审批操作

创建收货 (BAPI)

使用付款时付款条款的供应商发票的账龄分析

采购申请审批和审批

管理无采购订单的发票

将此内容转化您的优势，因为它不仅为您提供可在 SAP Build Lobby 中部署的技术部件，还为您提供来自开发团队和合作伙伴且经认证可上载 SAP Build 内容的建议和最佳实践。此外，我们还确保定期更新和维护内容。

用例

开始使用企业自动化的最佳方法是使用具体的用例。在这里，我们将重点关注一个场景，该场景经常出现在许多组织中，并且是低效和重复性活动的根本原因：每次需要在 SAP 中处理新的采购订单时，都会包括缺少需要手动添加的主数据。在此，我们正在利用 SAP Signavio Process Intelligence 识别缺少物料代码的采购订单凭证。识别非编码物料后，我们将在 SAP Build 中触发流程以相应地分配物料代码。此外，我们还利用机器学习技术来确定合适的供应商。在此图中，您可以看到非编码物料的自动采购组分配如何：

 

与往常一样，我们建议从 Signavio Process Insights 开始，评估您的流程架构并识别您最大的自动化潜力。在此，您可以深入了解您的寻源到付款领域，并以较低的自动化率查看流程步骤。

您还将收到来自标准 SAP 应用程序或 SAP Build 的直接改进建议和最佳实践。

 

您可以利用 SAP Signavio Process Intelligence 分析成功处理采购订单凭证需要处理的不同步骤。 

在此，我们以复杂的方式评估单个流程实例，并评估采购订单处理的平均周期时间。

 

使用此工具，您可以获得富有洞察力的流程绩效指标，例如缺少物料代码的采购订单数量。

您可以快速意识到，具有非编码物料的采购订单会导致业务用户的中断和重复性任务。

此外，您可以利用与 SAP Build 的本机连接并应用业务逻辑直接触发流程，而无需人工干预。

因此，每次确定非编码采购订单时，我们都会在 SAP Build 中启动流程实例。

为了让人员处于循环中，您可以向业务用户发送审批通知，以进行数据验证和异常处理。

通过此方法，您可以使工作流中的上下文数据可供业务用户查看。

 

使用 SAP Build Process Automation 的低代码设计器执行流程。 

在此场景中，我们启动步骤以识别正确的物料代码，并使用机器学习将正确的供应商映射到每个凭证。在流程逻辑结束时，工作流使用本机连接器直接在 SAP S/4HANA 中过账缺少的物料代码。

 

为了实现非常复杂的集成体系结构，我们还包括 SAP Integration Suite 来处理多个系统中的采购订单凭证。

在此，我们利用预构建的集成流在 SAP Business Suite 企业预置系统中复制采购订单。

 

结论

Enterprise Automation 目前是 SAP 的最热门主题，它允许您在异构环境中集成应用程序、发现低效环节和自动化流程。投资这项计划必将带来长期的业务成果，并采用完善的方法自动运行和管理企业内部的自动化流程。

这只是如何在寻源到付款上下文中使用这些技术的示例。请记住，此框架具有高度适应性，可用于任何业务范围、行业或用例。因此，请务必查看我们的其他资料、赋能和文档，开启 SAP 企业自动化之旅：

 

  • 请访问 sap.com/enterprise-automation
  • 查看 SAP Build Store 中的预构建集成和自动化内容
  • 查看《教程导航器》中的“实践”材料和说明

entry.title: 利用 SAP 的企业自动化处理销售线索到收款流程
entry.content:
本文为翻译文，原文链接Leverage Enterprise Automation with SAP for Lead-to-Cash processes，原文作者Manuel_Namyslo。

简介

在现代业务的动态架构中，企业面临着将潜在销售线索高效转化为收入的挑战。销售线索到现金流程在此过程中起着关键作用，包括从销售线索生成到现金收款的各个阶段。销售、营销和财务职能的无缝集成对于持续的业务增长和成功至关重要。现代销售线索到收款流程包括以下步骤：

 

通过优先考虑从销售线索生成到现金收款的无缝活动流，企业能够优化资源，提升客户体验，并在各自行业中扮演敏捷且响应迅速的企业。但是，许多企业都面临着从销售线索到现金的难题，这与流程管理不佳密切相关：

 

  • 客户旅程不明确
  • 销售线索跟踪和管理流程不足
  • 销售团队与营销团队之间沟通不畅
  • 流程期间的数据捕获不足
  • 数据质量问题
  • 难以准确预测销售目标
  • 客户启用周期较长
  • 延迟开票付款或收款问题

 

在本博文中，我想向您展示如何利用企业自动化来克服销售线索到现金领域的低效流程、重复性任务和不良的流程管理。但首先，什么是 SAP 的企业自动化？

 

什么是企业自动化？

借助 SAP 的企业自动化功能，我们的客户能够利用 SAP Integration Suite、SAP Signavio 和 SAP Build 等一流的工具，快速、轻松地洞察业务流程，并利用合适的工具实现自动化，实现出色的业务成果。这些工具与现有业务应用程序无缝协作，不会增加复杂性：

 

  • SAP Integration Suite 是一款集成平台即服务 (iPaaS)，具有数千个与 SAP 和非 SAP 应用程序的预构建集成、API 和连接器。它降低了企业预置和多云环境的复杂性，可帮助您实现优化的端到端业务流程。
  • SAP Signavio 提供基于 200,000 个行业基准和最佳实践的业务流程可见性、潜在瓶颈、根本原因分析以及改进建议。深入了解效率低下有助于组织优化和自动化流程。
  • SAP Build 是一款低代码解决方案，可以轻松拖放创建自动化和应用。它包括面向 SAP 和非 SAP 系统的预构建自动化和连接器。业务专家可以使用 SAP Build 快速解决流程低效问题。

 

 

 

销售线索到收款的预构建内容

从 SAP 的企业自动化开始的最简单方法是使用预构建内容。内容提供技术部件，您可以实施这些部件，以及直接来自 SAP 开发团队和合作伙伴的最佳实践和建议。您可以在此处找到我们的内容：

SAP Build – 预构建内容

在此，您可以找到一些专为优化从线索到收款而设计的内容示例：

通过 Excel 自动创建销售订单

使用参考创建产品主数据

使用灵活工作流的销售订单审批扩展示例

线索到订单的智能工作流

使用 Excel 通过电子邮件自动创建销售订单

创建客户物料信息记录

批量维护销售合同

根据非结构化数据自动创建销售订单请求

项目经理项目创建

项目活动触发器

 

将此内容用于您的优势 - 因为它不仅为您提供可在 SAP Build Lobby 中部署的技术部件，还为您提供来自开发团队和合作伙伴且经认证可上载 SAP Build 内容的建议和最佳实践。此外，我们还确保定期更新和维护内容。

 

用例

让我们用一个用例来具体了解一下！销售订单处理是“销售线索到现金”领域的常见场景。它可以包括用户体验和流程执行方面的特定需求。例如，数据验证的层次审批步骤或用于分类折扣规则或客户细分的复杂业务规则。或将销售订单创建连接到多个记录系统的特定集成要求。在此，您可以查看场景外观的概览：

我们建议从 SAP Signavio Process Insights 开始。在此，您可以查看流程架构并评估端到端场景，如销售线索到收款、寻源到付款和记录到报表。

根据你的数据发现卓越实践和改进建议，并对标行业标准。在这里，你可以看到“销售线索到收款”业务线中出现的低效场景，这些场景具有较高的自动化潜力。您还可以直接获得 SAP Business Accelerator Hub 中预构建内容的建议：

 

在 SAP Signavio Process Intelligence 中，您可以执行流程挖掘以深入了解整个销售线索到收款流程，并深入了解销售订单凭证创建的每个流程变式。

发现不同的流变化并确定需要改进的瓶颈，例如销售订单凭证的手动处理：

 

 

基于 BPMN 2.0 可视化流程，并查看 SAP S/4HANA 中订单创建的所有必要步骤。您还可以与利益相关方协作，以确定改进领域并确定其优先级。

 

 

发现 SAP Signavio 的流程效率低下后，您可以跳转到 SAP Build 以生成自定义扩展。在这种情况下，我们利用 SAP Build Apps 创建可定制的移动应用，以增强销售订单处理。每个销售代表都可以使用该自定义应用，将新销售订单输入到记录系统中。

为此，我们利用基于低代码的设计时间，并在开发流程中包括多个利益相关方：

 

 

 

还可以使用流程自动化扩展应用程序，以协调工作流场景和 Robotic Process Automation (RPA)。

通过可定制的审批步骤、业务规则、机器学习和与 SAP 和非 SAP 系统的本机连接，在 SAP S/4HANA 中执行销售订单创建流程：

 

 

 

在下一个屏幕截图中，您可以看到用于检查和审批销售订单凭证的嵌入式表单构建器。然后，审批人可以与 SAP Task Center 中的流程任务进行交互，例如批准或拒绝销售订单凭证。

通过此工具，您可以利用直观的拖放功能以及预先开发的 UI 元素：

 

除本机连接器外，您还可以使用表面自动化轻松集成到 SAP 和非 SAP 系统。

这是使用经典 RPA 功能（如屏幕录制和屏幕捕获）自动执行重复和手动任务的常用方法。在这种情况下，我们可以将新的销售订单凭证输入到 SAP S/4HANA 或将交易数据或主数据复制到系统中：

在开发项目中，您会很快注意到的一点是，您无法实现任何无法集成的自动化。尽管 SAP Build 允许您连接到 SAP 和非 SAP 系统，但 SAP Integration Suite 可以将连接引入完全不同的级别。

使用此工具，您可以生成自己的集成流，以将流程连接到异构 IT 架构中的任意类型的应用程序。 利用预构建内容，通过高级值映射和消息转换在第三方应用程序中复制销售订单凭证：

 

 

结论

 

Enterprise Automation 目前是 SAP 的最热门主题，它允许您在异构环境中集成应用程序、发现低效环节和自动化流程。投资这项计划必将带来长期的业务成果，并采用完善的方法自动运行和管理企业内部的自动化流程。

这只是如何在“销售线索到收款”上下文中使用这些技术的示例。请记住，此框架具有高度适应性，可用于任何业务范围、行业或用例。因此，请务必查看我们的其他资料、赋能和文档，开启 SAP 企业自动化之旅：

 

  • 请访问 sap.com/enterprise-automation
  • 查看 SAP Build Store 中的预构建集成和自动化内容
  • 查看《教程导航器》中的“实践”材料和说明

 

当然，如果你想快速开启低代码开发之旅，加入我们的 SAP Builders 社区，开始学习 SAP Build 解决方案！

entry.title: 利用 SAP 的企业自动化实现记录到报告流程
entry.content:
本文为翻译文，原文链接Leverage Enterprise Automation with SAP for Record-to-Report processes，原文作者Manuel_Namyslo。

 

简介

记录到报告是一个重要的财务流程，对寻求透明度、问责制和战略决策的组织来说至关重要。此综合流程涉及财务交易的记录、处理和报告，最终导致创建准确可靠的财务报表。以下是汇总记录到报告流程的主要步骤和活动：

 

总之，记录到报告流程是财务管理的支柱，为组织成功奠定了基础。其影响不仅限于合规性，还涉及战略决策、风险管理和利益相关方关系。如果执行不当，则无法促进弹性、敏捷和透明的财务框架，并导致企业组织面临以下难题：  

 

  • 订单处理延迟
  • 客户信息不完整或不准确
  • 库存管理挑战
  • 与客户沟通效率低下
  • 信用和开票问题
  • 无效订单履行
  • 发票争议和核算问题
  • 付款处理挑战
  • 客户服务和支持问题
  • 法规合规性问题

 

在本博文中，我们将向您展示如何利用 SAP 的企业自动化来管理和优化订单到收款流程。但首先，什么是 SAP 的企业自动化？

 

什么是企业自动化？

借助 SAP 的企业自动化功能，我们的客户能够利用 SAP Integration Suite、SAP Signavio 和 SAP Build 等一流的工具，快速、轻松地洞察业务流程，并利用合适的工具实现自动化，实现出色的业务成果。这些工具与现有业务应用程序无缝协作，不会增加复杂性。

 

  • SAP Integration Suite 是一款集成平台即服务 (iPaaS)，具有数千个与 SAP 和非 SAP 应用程序的预构建集成、API 和连接器。它降低了企业预置和多云环境的复杂性，可帮助您实现优化的端到端业务流程。

 

  • SAP Signavio 提供基于 200,000 个行业基准和最佳实践的业务流程可见性、潜在瓶颈、根本原因分析以及改进建议。深入了解效率低下有助于组织优化和自动化流程。

 

  • SAP Build 是一款低代码解决方案，可以轻松拖放创建自动化和应用。它包括面向 SAP 和非 SAP 系统的预构建自动化和连接器。业务专家可以使用 SAP Build 快速解决流程低效问题。

 

 

 

 

记录到报告的预构建内容：

从 SAP 的企业自动化开始的最简单方法是使用预构建内容。预构建内容提供技术部件，您可以实施这些部件，以及直接来自 SAP 开发团队和合作伙伴的最佳实践和建议。您可以在此处找到我们的内容：

SAP Build – 预构建内容

在此，您可以找到一些专为优化记录到报告而设计的内容示例：

从电子邮件提取供应商发票文件并上载到 SAP Central Invoice Management

总账科目条目的建议重新分类

在不影响财务过账的情况下，批量更新总账日记账分录明细

批量更新资产主数据

批量上载付款通知

自动上载总账分录

批量上传银行对账单文件

自动批量上载总账日记账分录

自动收货/收发票清算

应计过账的批量自动化

总账主记录创建流程

创建收货 (BAPI)

日记账分录过账审批

催款运行 - F150 (ECC)

 

将此内容转化为您的优势，因为它不仅为您提供可在 SAP Build Lobby 中部署的技术部件，还为您提供来自开发团队和合作伙伴且经认证可上载 SAP Build 内容的建议和最佳实践。此外，我们还确保定期更新和维护内容。

 

用例

让我们通过真实用例深入了解这个主题！如果没有简化和自动化过账新总账科目等财务流程，则可能需要手动和重复活动。尤其是当业务组织需要特定流程流来满足合规性和法规要求时。这包括用于审批人确定的业务规则、总账科目的不同分类或各种条件或阈值（也需要考虑）。

在此，您可以看到 S/4HANA 中基于审批的总账科目过账的外观：

我们建议从 SAP Signavio Process Insights 开始，以获取流程架构和最大自动化潜力的初始概览。获取直接改进建议，了解记录到报告方面的预构建内容和卓越实践。

在此，您可以利用 Robotic Process Automation 机器人和工作流流程来改进财务流程。所有建议均在 Signavio 中列出，如屏幕截图所示：

在 SAP Signavio Process Intelligence 中启动调查，以进一步了解财务关账、日记账分录过账或在总账中处理新记录等场景。

生成有关流程绩效指标（如平均周期时间或流程相关性）的分析仪表盘。

 

为了过账新的总账科目，您可以为业务用户提供中央访问点，以访问 SAP 和非 SAP 源中的应用程序和流程。此中央访问点随 SAP Build Work Zone（标准版）提供。

业务用户可以直接从主页启动创建总账科目的流程。

 

在此，您可以查看直观的表单应用程序，以允许业务用户将流程实例作为自助服务触发。 

在这种情况下，您可以启动审批工作流以在 SAP S/4HANA 中创建新总账科目。

 

在流程逻辑中，您可以引入审批人并处理利益相关方以验证关键数据并确保合规性。 

现在，业务用户可以丰富附加信息并相应地审批账户。

 

使用 SAP Build Process Automation 开发具有预构建流程活动的自定义流程，可以在图形布局设计器中进行配置。

设计单个审批工作流并处理用于过账总账科目的业务规则。

 

项目用于生产后，您可以检查每个流程实例的状态并检查关键业务数据。

申请者可以检查已发送审批的新客户的状态。

 

连接到各种后端系统，以进行数据验证、数据转换和实体映射。

在此，您还可以利用连接器集合在审批表单中检索总账科目编号范围详细信息。

 

 

结论

Enterprise Automation 目前是 SAP 的最热门主题，它允许您在异构环境中集成应用程序、发现低效环节和自动化流程。投资这项计划必将带来长期的业务成果，并采用完善的方法自动运行和管理企业内部的自动化流程。

这只是如何在记录到报告上下文中使用这些技术的示例。请记住，此框架具有高度适应性，可用于任何业务范围、行业或用例。因此，请务必查看我们的其他资料、赋能和文档，开启 SAP 企业自动化之旅：

 

  • 请访问 sap.com/enterprise-automation
  • 查看 SAP Build Store 中的预构建集成和自动化内容
  • 查看《教程导航器》中的“实践”材料和说明

entry.title: Unleashing Centralized Digital Experience for Suppliers – SAP Build Workzone
entry.content:
A Wave of Modern Digital Workplace

In today's business landscape, digitalization and innovation pose significant challenges for companies. To meet the ever-evolving needs of customers, businesses must swiftly adopt cloud solutions. However, progress is often hindered by limited resources and the complexities of maintaining IT infrastructures with multiple applications. To overcome these challenges, companies need to adopt digital processes, reduce technological obstacles, and empower both experts and citizen developers to drive innovation. 

This blog post will explore how SAP Build Workzone empowers companies to unleash the full potential of their central digital workplace, creating a more connected and efficient ecosystem for suppliers.


Background & Business Challenges

Customer is committed to becoming an Intelligent Enterprise by leveraging the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). To achieve this, they are dedicated to modernizing and replacing outdated business processes, empowering IT professionals and business users with tools to efficiently create engaging business sites for employees, partners, suppliers, and customers. A suitable replacement for the current landscape of supplier resources and applications is imperative. The scattered information throughout the enterprise lacks a centralized access point, causing inefficiencies in navigating through numerous disconnected systems. Decentralized content creation further hinders the development of flexible business sites and pages. The customer’s objective is to boost user productivity and engagement through interactive workspaces, forums, and knowledge-based articles. By centralizing information and facilitating efficient content creation, the company aims to create a seamless and productive environment for all users.

 

Customer's Vision to Elevate Supplier Engagement

The vision for the Supplier Portal is the ultimate centralized platform for Vendors/Suppliers and external partners. The aim is to provide easy access to all necessary resources in one location, including the Supplier Handbook, Supplier Resources, Proxied Applications, Contingent Worker Resources, and the option to access the Restricted Supplier Portal content. The customer worked with the SAP MaxAttention team to create a Digital Workplace that is agile and consistent with SAP's user experience. In this process, the team incorporated the latest innovations of BTP to provide a better user experience and easier content management. After a successful proof-of-concept, the team confidently deployed the updated content for productive usage through internal and external user onboarding processes

 

SAP MaxAttention Engagement

The success of this project is a true testament to SAP MaxAttention’s expertise and commitment to delivering exceptional results. During this engagement, SAP MaxAttention team worked along with SAP Build Work Zone Product Development and the customer’s CoE teams. This collaboration resulted in quick ROI and increased value by maximizing existing SAP solutions, specifically in the space of SAP Build subscription. SAP Build is powered by SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) which enables business experts to easily create and augment enterprise applications, automate tedious processes, and design engaging business sites by using visual tools and a rich set of services and pre-built content. SAP Build capabilities include:

  • SAP Build Code – SAP Build Code provides generative AI-based code development with Joule copilot, optimized for Java and JavaScript application development. It offers a turn-key environment for coding, testing, integrations, and application lifecycle management.
  • SAP Build Apps – Evolution of AppGyver to build mobile and web applications with a pixel-perfect design using the drag-and-drop functionality and a rich component library.
  • SAP Build Process Automation – Offers task and process automation leveraging robotic process automation (RPA) bots, workflows, forms, embedded artificial intelligence (AI), business rules, and decisions.
  • SAP Build Work Zone – Allows the creation of enterprise-grade custom business sites using new capabilities such as a flexible page builder and context-aware integrated UI cards.

Architecture

Below is the architecture of the digital Supplier Portal in SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition.

Delivery Scope

Setup of SAP Build Work Zone

For the platform preparation, we started with onboarding activities in SAP BTP, for example, Sub-account setup, setting up SAML Trust with PingIDP for authentication, user management & provisioning, and authorization management, data privacy, workspace setup to configure areas and workspace.

Building a Central Entry Point (Home Page)

The company's home page has been redesigned and now serves as the landing page for the website, featuring protected content. The customer team has been given the authority to distinguish between the administrative aspects of the SAP Build Work Zone landing page and to use pre-built templates and layouts to implement best practices. The objective is to differentiate between the usage of different widgets and to decide whether to build a Workspace or leave the content on the Home Page.

Supplier Handbook

Supplier Handbook workspace hosts a collection of key resources and assets (e.g., revision-controlled documents) used by customer’s Vendors/Suppliers. Private workspace access is only for onboard suppliers. Some of the key requirements were to have an intuitive user experience, manage contents and their versions, and send communication to the stakeholders whenever changes are made to the contents. 

Supplier Resources

Supplier Resources is a public workspace that hosts a collection of resources and assets needed for supplier onboarding. The customer’s prospective and established suppliers can find all the publicly available documents, process documentation, and answers to frequently asked questions related to the customer’s Account Payable, Invoicing Process, etc. This workspace also provides an entry point to the Supplier Handbook that provides access to protected resources.

Just-In-Time Reports Integration via SAP Build Process Automation

One of the requirements of the project is to enable vendors to view stocking reports in real-time. To achieve this, we leveraged SAP Build Process Automation.  SAP Build Process Automation is a citizen developer solution to adapt, improve, and innovate business processes with no-code workflow management and robotic process automation capabilities.
Using this tool, we developed unattended BOT to publish reports from BI and S/4HANA. On a periodical basis, automatic synch between the FTP and the SAP Build Work Zone is triggered. This business requirement was prototyped using SAP Build Work Zone OData API. The below diagrams illustrate the technical architecture of the solution.  

Supplier Registration Forms

To fulfill the need for supplier diversity, the existing registration form for suppliers to request access to a private workspace contains various form controls. The form includes multipage reports, and dynamic content, and retains automatic answers to meet the key requirements.

Outcomes

Empowered Business Users with Enterprise-Grade Business Sites

SAP Build Work Zone advanced edition enables business users to boost productivity and engagement by creating digital workplace solutions. This platform provides a central entry point for accessing business processes, applications, communication, and information from any device.

Business Value:

  • Improve productivity by accessing apps, processes, and information all in one place.
  • Experience a seamlessly integrated environment across SAP and third-party apps to accommodate collaboration tools and integrated information
  • With SAP Build Work Zone as a collaboration platform, users will have all the resources needed to make informed decisions faster
  • Say goodbye to clunky workflows, and hello to a world of efficient business apps, reports, and information that promote collaboration and drive success

Key Milestones:

  • Project Duration: < 4 months
  • Unified and Intelligent work experience by providing central access to apps, tasks, notifications, information, and communication.              
  • Optimize Business Processes with employees, partners, customers & suppliers.
  • Reduce TCO by leveraging existing investments in the SAP Business Technology Platform and harmonization of existing systems and repositories.
  • Integrated collaboration capabilities that can be extended to other business processes
  • Seamless SAP and third-party apps integration
  • Establish Central Inbox

Following are some of the business KPIs:

Contact persons:

SAP MaxAttention CoE: Kiran Kola, Rohit Dwivedi 

SAP Product Management: Florian Buech

entry.title: Processes can now be scheduled 📅!
entry.content:
You can now schedule processes – not just automation bots – in SAP Build Process Automation.

Once you deploy your process:

  1. Go into Control Tower > Environments, and open your environment.
  2. Go to Triggers.
  3. Click Add Trigger.
  4. Schedule your process by setting a schedule and providing the needed inputs for the process.

A few things I noticed:

  • You seem to be able to have an API trigger and a schedule trigger at the same time.
  • At first, I could not find how to edit or delete the trigger. But then realized that it was a little off the screen, even with my browser at 100% zoom. 
  • Seems you must schedule recurrence, though you could just limit the timeframe to prevent this recurrence from happening.
  • It's all really easy to do 😺

Document is here: https://help.sap.com/docs/PRODUCTS/b078c7aa93ed4fc391e3323b7a255b84/b2b7113205ef42f688cf59ab9df4195c.html?locale=en-US&version=Cloud

entry.title: See how SAP Enterprise Support helps customers use SAP Build to empower their digital transformation
entry.content:
SAP Build is a comprehensive suite of low-code and pro-code tools designed to accelerate application development and automation with the power of generative AI. It is built on SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) from SAP that helps accelerate development and automation. SAP Build is an enabler for everyone no matter the skill level to create and enhance enterprise applications, process automations, and business sites, all with drag-and-drop simplicity. 

Consisting of three components SAP Build Apps, SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Work Zone, it empowers more users to develop irrespective of their skill level thereby lessening the burden on professional developers.

SAP Build Code is a comprehensive application development environment tailored for developers working with Java and JavaScript. The turnkey solution combines runtime and design time capabilities with built-in enterprise solution integrations, DevOps, and Application Lifecycle Management. Joule, the AI copilot that understands your business, is available to assist with code generation.

In this blog, we are elaborating the assets which are available to provide foundational Support to customers as part of their SAP Enterprise Support cloud edition subscription to use the SAP Build portfolio to empower their digital transformation. 

With SAP Enterprise Support, customers can:

  • Receive guidance and realize value through AI-powered services, best practice content, remote quality checks, and assessment services. 
  • Empower your team to gain knowledge and skills and collaborate with experts for answers to support-related questions.
  • Transform your end-to-end landscape with application lifecycle management solutions to deploy, operate, and optimize cloud and hybrid business solutions.

If you want to just gain an overview of the SAP Build portfolio we have provided this SAP Build Big Picture session. In this e-learning, you will gain an overview of the SAP Build portfolio including SAP Build Code. It discusses the importance of the Clean Core concept and explore the low code/no code tools available for building new applications. Additionally, a high-level overview of SAP Build Code application development, assisted by Joule, is provided. For more detail, we have provided all the overview sessions for the SAP Build portfolio in the learning program Learn to develop using low-code through SAP Build provided through the SAP Enterprise Support Value Map program.

Below we have listed the SAP Build components and the corresponding support provided to customers to get started:

SAP Build Process Automation

SAP Build Process Automation powers the automation of workflows and tasks with comprehensive workflow management, robotic process automation, and AI capabilities.  

To gain an overview to SAP Build Process Automation we have created a Discovery Center mission on Foundational support to start with SAP Build Process Automation. This includes an introductory session which has a demo the tool in action. Also it includes a multi-day Expert Guided Implementation service on SAP Build Process Automation. The purpose of this EGI service is to ramp-up customers to understand and adopt SAP Build Process Automation. In the first step, we give an overview of process automation in the context of SAP Build. Afterwards we show case the capabilities of SAP Build Process Automation and customers learn how to create workflows, decision management, and task automation with powerful yet intuitive no-code capabilities through the configuration of a specific business process to approve Sales Orders automatically. Further information including how to register for the service is provided here.

SAP Build Apps

SAP Build Apps is an evolution of SAP AppGyver and it enables users to build web and mobile enterprise applications.  With hundreds of templates and pre-built business logic components, you can jumpstart your application projects and reduce development time. 

To gain an overview to SAP Build Process Automation we have created a Discovery Center mission on Foundational support to start with SAP Build Apps. This includes an introductory session. Also it includes a multi-day Expert Guided Implementation service on SAP Build Apps. The purpose of this EGI service is to ramp-up customers to understand and adopt SAP Build Apps. In the first step, we give an overview of application development in the context of SAP Build. Afterwards we show case the capabilities of SAP Build Apps and customers learn how to create mobile and web applications, connect to SAP systems, and deploy and run on SAP Business Technology Platform.​ Further information including how to register for the service is provided here.

SAP Build Work Zone

SAP Build Work Zone, brings the capabilities of SAP Launchpad and SAP Work Zone into one solution, facilitating the rapid creation of engaging and personalized business sites. It provides centralized access to business application information on any device.

To give an overview on SAP Build Work Zone, we have created the e-learning Explore the power of SAP Build Work Zone - SAP BTP Adoption Tutorial which provides a comprehensive Central Entry Point Digital experience. It encompasses an introduction to essential tools such as SAP Build Work Zone, SAP Task Center, and SAP Mobile Start. Key topics are discussed including the capabilities of SAP Build Work Zone, both standard and advanced editions and Identity and Access management through the SAP Cloud Identity Service. Also, we take a deep dive into the One Inbox suite quality of the SAP Task Center. and SAP Mobile Start as your native mobile entry point.

To provide further information for SAP Build Work Zone, we have created additional e-learnings. Firstly, we give an overview to integrate SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition and SAP Mobile Start. We walk you through the configuration process for the SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition ensuring you gain a comprehensive understanding of its setup and functionalities. Also, you will gain proficiency in integrating SAP Mobile Start with SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition.

Also, we have provided an e-learning for SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition Deep Dive to effectively configure, deploy, and manage SAP Build Work Zone environments, leveraging its capabilities to enhance collaboration and productivity within your organization. The content shows how to set up SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition with integration of IAS (Identity Authentication Service) and IPS (Identity Provisioning Service) for user access, the process of creating a workspace and adding content such as How-to documents and technical support access, developing a UI Card in SAP Business Application Studio and deploying it to the workspace and integrating the Launchpad service and adding exposed content from an SAP S/4HANA system.

SAP Build Code

Apart from the SAP Build Big Picture session which provides an overview to SAP Build Code, we are piloting a new Expert Guided Implementation service on Cloud Application Programming Development using SAP Build Code. The purpose of this service is to empower customers with the knowledge of CAP development in SAP HANA Cloud and provide customers with the knowledge to develop and design in SAP HANA Cloud utilizing the SAP Business Application studio using SAP Build Code and the SAP AI co-pilot Joule. To find out more about this pilot through SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council, please reach out directly.

The e-learning Clean Core with SAP Business Technology Platform offers valuable insights to understand how SAP Business Technology Platform can help cultivate a cleaner and more sustainable core for SAP systems. It offers insights into how SAP BTP can support the fundamental pillars of data, integration, and extensibility. It explores the topic of extensibility in-depth and how the various components of SAP Business Technology Platform support the building of extensions in line with clean core principles.

For customers, if you have issues accessing the above links, there may be an authorizations issue. Please note a one-time registration in SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support, is required for most of the above assets. A detailed step-by step guide to registration can be found here.

For internal colleagues, if you cannot access the above links, please use the following link, click on “Access” and use the above direct link once access has been granted.

We hope that this range of content and assets will support you in your digital transformation. For any queries in relation to any of the above assets, please reach out to us directly.

Thanks and Regards,

Robert Kelly

SAP BTP Lead Architect – SAP Enterprise Support

entry.title: Understanding SAP RAP, CAP, Build, Joule, Embedded Analytics: A Simple Guide
entry.content:
Introduction

In the rapidly evolving world of SAP, staying updated with the latest technologies can be challenging. Today, we will simplify five key SAP technologies: SAP RAP, SAP CAP, SAP Build, SAP Joule, and SAP Embedded Analytics. Let’s understand what they are, how they differ, and when to use each one.

SAP RAP (Restful ABAP Programming)

Let’s start with SAP RAP. ABAP has been the backbone of SAP for years, and RAP brings a modern approach to it.

 

  • What is it?: RAP stands for Restful ABAP Programming. It’s a methodology to develop Fiori apps using ABAP, adhering to modern RESTful principles.
  • Why use it?: If you are an experienced ABAP developer, RAP makes it easier to develop cloud-ready and service-oriented applications without having to learn a completely new language.
  • Where to use it?: It’s ideal for those already familiar with ABAP and looking to transition to S/4HANA and cloud environments.

 

SAP CAP (Cloud Application Programming)

Next, let’s look at SAP CAP. This technology is gaining a lot of attention.

 

  • What is it?: CAP, or Cloud Application Programming model, is SAP’s framework for developing cloud-native applications. It combines JavaScript, Node.js, and OData services.
  • Why use it?: CAP is great for building scalable, flexible, and modern applications on the SAP Cloud Platform. It leverages the best of modern web development technologies.
  • Where to use it?: Ideal for developers comfortable with modern web technologies and looking to harness the full potential of the cloud.

 

SAP Build

Now, let’s discuss SAP Build. This tool is for those who might not be expert coders but still want to create powerful applications.

 

  • What is it?: SAP Build is a no-code/low-code platform that allows you to design, develop, and deploy applications with minimal coding.
  • Why use it?: It’s perfect for rapid prototyping and quickly bringing applications to life. SAP Build simplifies the development process significantly.
  • Where to use it?: Best for business users or developers who need to create applications quickly without deep coding knowledge.

 

SAP Joule

Let’s move on to SAP Joule. This one is relatively new and focuses on artificial intelligence.

 

  • What is it?: SAP Joule is an AI-driven tool designed to bring advanced intelligence to business processes, helping users make smarter decisions.
  • Why use it?: It integrates AI into your existing SAP landscape, providing insights and automation capabilities that can greatly enhance productivity.
  • Where to use it?: Ideal for organizations looking to incorporate AI and machine learning into their SAP systems to drive innovation and efficiency.

 

SAP Embedded Analytics

Finally, we have SAP Embedded Analytics. This tool is all about leveraging data for better insights.

 

  • What is it?: Embedded Analytics allows real-time analytics within SAP applications, providing users with immediate insights without needing to switch to separate analytics tools.
  • Why use it?: It offers real-time data analysis and visualization capabilities, enhancing decision-making processes with up-to-date information.
  • Where to use it?: Best for organizations that need to embed analytics directly into their business processes to enable data-driven decision-making.

 

Comparison: RAP vs. CAP vs. Build vs. Joule vs. Embedded Analytics

 

  • Ease of Use: SAP Build is the easiest to use, followed by RAP. CAP requires more knowledge of modern development practices. SAP Joule and Embedded Analytics need an understanding of AI and data analytics, respectively.
  • Flexibility: CAP offers the most flexibility for developing cloud-native applications. RAP is flexible within the ABAP environment, Build is great for quick and simple applications, Joule enhances processes with AI, and Embedded Analytics provides real-time data insights.
  • Use Case:Use RAP if you are sticking with ABAP and S/4HANA.CAP for new cloud applications. Build for rapid prototyping and business user-driven development. Joule for integrating AI into your business processes. Embedded Analytics for embedding real-time analytics into your operations.

 

Conclusion

Whether you are an experienced ABAP developer looking to modernize with RAP, a tech enthusiast exploring cloud-native development with CAP, a business user aiming for quick wins with SAP Build, an innovator integrating AI with SAP Joule, or a data-driven decision-maker using SAP Embedded Analytics, there’s a suitable tool for everyone in the SAP ecosystem. Choosing the right tool can make all the difference, helping you achieve your goals more efficiently. Happy coding and innovating!

entry.title: 介绍从 SAP Intelligent RPA 到 SAP Build Process Automation 的就地迁移
entry.content:
本文为翻译文，原文链接Introducing in-place Migration from SAP Intelligent RPA to SAP Build Process Automation，原文作者 Alex-Fortin.

尊敬的社区成员，

在接下来的几周内，我们将启用升级现有 Intelligent RPA租户的功能，以便通过几个步骤成为Build Process Automation租户。无需导出现有项目并在其他租户中导入项目。无需部署、创建触发器、注册代理等。

将 Intelligent RPA 租户转换为 Build Process Automation 租户需要执行几个步骤。

 

前提条件

明确地说，我们支持就地迁移，以确保迁移顺利且轻松。为此，我们有一些要求以避免数据丢失和部分转换。

  • 租户中不再有 Desktop Studio 项目或包
  • 租户中没有更多维护项目

如果某些内容阻止就地迁移，您可以下载详细信息。

我们准备了 SAP Note 3334979，其中提供了一些详细信息。

如果一切正常，则按照以下七个步骤：

步骤

位置

步骤 1 - 在您的租户中添加 SAP Build Process Automation 的Entitlement（权利）

BTP 主控室

步骤 2 - 单击“启用迁移”

Cloud Factory

步骤 3 - 订阅Build Process Automation

BTP 主控室

等待几分钟，完成订阅和迁移

 

步骤 4 - 添加和/或修改角色集合

BTP 主控室

步骤 5 - 连接到 Build Process Automation 并检查结果

Build Process Automation

步骤 6 - 检查或更新代理（可选）

本地代理

步骤 7 - 取消订阅（删除）SAP Intelligent RPA

BTP 主控室

 

开始之前

最好清理租户中不再使用或不准确的不必要内容。与往常一样，最好更新到最新的 SDK 或代理版本。之前也要检查您的合同条款。

步骤

步骤 1 - 在租户中添加 SAP Build Process Automation 权利

 

要租用Build Process Automation（构建流程自动化），需要一些Entitlement(权利)。否则，您将无法进一步操作。假设您的全局账户已具有相应的权利（您需要核对合同），此处为给定子账户的步骤：

 

 

点击“Entitlement”（权利）

 

点击“编辑”

 

点击“Add Service Plans”（添加服务计划）

 

搜索“Build”

 

选择不同的服务和选项，例如 

·        标准（应用程序）

·        有人值守自动化

·        无人值守自动化

·        标准用户

·        高级用户

·        api-calls

 

 

添加服务计划

 

配置值

 

现在，您可以“保存”

 

您的子账户已准备好订阅 Build Process Automation。

第 2 步 - 单击“Enable migration”（启用迁移）

 

以职员身份连接 Cloud Factory。应显示新磁贴。

 

将显示“启用迁移”按钮。单击 ，需要确认。

 

现在，您的租户已启用迁移，并将解锁双重租用。

如果右图磁贴显示，则

 

下载报告并修复阻碍因素。文档中将提供更多详细信息。

 

步骤 3 - 订阅构建流程自动化

您可以在子账户中订阅或使用Booster：

 

此处的文档对过程进行了详细描述。

从 Intelligent RPA 迁移到构建流程自动化是单向升级，不可撤销。确认后，请注意 Cloud Factory 将不可用，并且所有作业都不会启动。因此，请相应地计划迁移，以避免长时间中断。

订阅和迁移在后台执行...

请等待几分钟，让系统从 Intelligent RPA 过渡到Build Process Automation(构建流程自动化)。

步骤 4 - 添加和/或修改角色集合

Build Process Automation（构建流程自动化）附带三个默认角色集合。需要将现有用户分配到此角色集合，或者您可以通过从 Build Process Automation 添加角色来修改现有角色集合。有关角色和角色集合的详细信息，请查看文档中的此主题。

步骤 5 - 连接到 Build Process Automation 并检查结果

订阅和迁移成功后，现在可以连接到Build Process Automation（构建流程自动化）。如果您以 ProcessAutomationAdmin 的身份连接，则应显示横幅：

 

现在，您可以快速检查内容是否正确迁移以及相应的环境。

步骤 6 - 检查或更新代理（可选）

如果使用代理的最新版本，代理将自动与新 URL 连接。可能需要重新启动代理。如果不是这种情况，则只需为代理提供新的 url。有关详细信息，请查看文档中的此主题。

步骤 7 - 取消订阅（删除）SAP Intelligent RPA

假设已检查内容且代理已完全连接，则可以终止 SAP Intelligent RPA 以解锁 SAP Build Process Automation 功能（包括创建新项目的功能）。取消订阅后，“回滚”将无法发生。

 

单击 SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation 的删除

 

 

确认删除 (DELETE)

如果成功订阅Build Process Automation（构建流程自动化），则 Intelligent RPA 中的数据现在已启用Build Process Automation（构建流程自动化）。现有数据不会删除，因为它们现在由 Build Process Automation 提供支持。

 

最终想法

通过就地迁移，我们旨在通过轻松的解决方案加快向 SAP Build Process Automation 的过渡。

如果出现以下情况，会发生什么...

在讨论本主题以确保顺利迁移时，如果发生错误，请立即联系支持部门，不要删除或取消订阅。

附加资源

  • 过渡指南
  • SAP Note 3334979
  • 文档（即将提供）

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation Pre-built content for SAP SuccessFactors Use cases
entry.content:
The definition of pre-built content, how it helps your business to jump-start your automation development and how to discover them is explained in the blog, ‘Accelerate Business Process Development with SAP Build Process Automation Pre-Built Content’

This blog covers the pre-built content for SAP SuccessFactors use cases, specifically.

SAP SuccessFactors provides cloud-based Human Capital Management (HCM) software solutions that cater to various aspects of managing an organization's workforce. Here are some common use cases where SuccessFactors is typically utilized:

  1. Talent Acquisition and Recruiting
  2. Employee Onboarding
  3. Learning and Development
  4. Employee Central

These use cases illustrate how organizations leverage SAP SuccessFactors to manage various aspects of their workforce efficiently, enhance employee engagement, and drive business success through strategic HR practices.

SAP Build Process Automation is used along with the SAP SuccessFactors application as an extension to solve complex business use cases and fill gaps that are not planned in the near future as a feature in SAP SuccessFactors. These are identified and validated as a white space in the SAP SuccessFactors product. Examples of the processes include- Contract Employee End Date Extension, Create Permission Group, Creation and Approval of Mass Job Requisition, Merge User in Learning Management System etc.

Currently there are 10+ SuccessFactors use cases for which pre-built content exists in SAP Business Accelerator Hub

They can be used with no or very minimal changes which makes it as industry best practice.

In order to discover the SuccessFactors use cases, follow the steps mentioned in the blog ‘Accelerate Business Process Development with SAP Build Process Automation Pre-Built Content’

Or you can simply use the below link to see them in SAP Business Accelerator Hub.

https://api.sap.com/build?$filter=(Products:%5B%22SAP%20SuccessFactors...

 

Explaining some of the SAP SuccessFactors Use-cases:

 1: Contract Employee End Date Extension

In SuccessFactors, managing the end date extension for contract employees involves utilizing step-by-step functionalities within the system to handle the extension of employment contracts, seamlessly.

This pre-built content streamlines and automates the process of extending the end date of the contract employee within the SAP SuccessFactors.

This process expedites the contract extension process, reducing manual effort and improving efficiency.

SOLUTION ARCHITECTURE:

It has the below features:

  • The template uses below API:
    • Employment Information API - To fetch the details of contract employee using filter for employee class.
    • User Management API - To retrieve Display Name, Job Tittle, and Email ID of the given user id
  • Upsert API - To update the contract end date of the employee          
  • This template works only for Contract Employees whose employee class is Contractor/3rd party.
  • Fetch operation – fetches contract employee’s data from SAP SuccessFactors using APIs, whose contracts are ending in x days from current date (e.g., 7 days from today).
  • Contract Extension Reminder Notification & Task:
    • Email notification is sent to the manager of the contract employee specifying the necessary information.
    • A contract extension request email is generated and sent to the designated manager’s SAP Build Process Automation inbox.
    • The designated manager reviews the contract employee details.
    • The manager has the option to either extend the contract end date or retain the contract end date.
  • Based on manager’s decision, contract end date changes:
    • If the manager wants to extend the contract end date with the new contract end date, the system performs necessary steps to update the contract end date in the HR system.

You can add the pre-built content into your tenant and explore more details via the below link.

Link to the template in Business Accelerator Hub

 

2: Creation and Approval of Mass Job Requisition

The creation and approval of mass job requisitions in SAP SuccessFactors are crucial for efficiently managing large-scale recruitment needs within organizations. By allowing HR departments to create multiple job openings simultaneously, it enhances operational efficiency and ensures consistency in job descriptions and requirements across various positions.

The approval process helps maintain budgetary control and compliance with organizational policies, ensuring that hiring aligns with strategic objectives. This streamlined approach not only accelerates the recruitment process but also supports scalability, enabling organizations to adapt swiftly to changing workforce demands while maintaining quality and compliance standards throughout.

This pre-built content streamlines and automates the process of creating and approving a job requisition within the SAP SuccessFactors system.

It does so by extracting the necessary data from a source file, often an Excel document, and utilizing relevant APIs to create and approve the requisition. Upon successful completion of the process the job requisition is in the 'Open' status. These requisitions can be published to internal and external job sites, making it available for candidates to view and apply for the respective job positions. This end-to-end process not only reduces manual data entry and processing but also enhances the speed and efficiency of job requisition creation and approval within the organization's hiring workflow.

SOLUTION ARCHITECTURE:

 

This template content involves several key steps:

  • API Usage: The process utilizes the JobRequisition API for creating job requisitions, approving them and handling declines.
  • Template Limitation: It is tailored for Basic Job Requisitions (Template ID - 1141).
  • Template Preparation: Users must fill a predefined Excel template with job requisition details; any number of files can be placed in a specified folder.
  • Process Trigger: The process begins by entering the Requestor email ID and folder path.
  • File Handling: The automation fetches and processes files from the designated folder.
  • Approval Notification: Approvers receive email notifications containing the job requisition ID for review and approval.
  • Approval Process: Approvers decide to approve or reject job requisitions.
  • Status Updates: Depending on the decision, the system updates the job requisition status accordingly.
  • Process Conclusion: The process concludes after status updates, moving processed files to a 'Processed' folder with timestamped renaming.
  • Notification Management: Email notifications inform stakeholders about process initiation and any errors encountered during execution.

You can add the pre-built content into your tenant and explore more details via the below link.

Link to the template in Business Accelerator Hub

 

3: Merge User in Learning Management System (LMS)

The Merge User functionality in SAP SuccessFactors Learning Management System (LMS) is essential for maintaining data integrity and operational efficiency.

It enables administrators to consolidate duplicate user profiles, which often occur due to system migrations, organizational changes, or multiple entries for the same individual. By merging these profiles, organizations ensure accurate learner records, streamline administrative tasks, improve reporting accuracy, and enhance the overall user experience by providing consistent access to learning content and progress tracking.

This feature not only reduces complexity in managing user data but also supports compliance efforts.

SOLUTION ARCHITECTURE:

This template contains several key steps :

  • The template utilizes OAuth Token API and AI_mergeUser API for integration.
  • Users fill out a predefined Excel template with User ID details, which can be stored in any named folder.
  • Starting the process requires providing the requestor email ID and folder path.
  • The automation fetches and processes files from the designated folder, handling multiple files simultaneously.
  • After processing, the status of each record is updated in the file's columns.
  • Processed files are moved to a 'Processed' folder within the same path, renamed with a timestamp if necessary.
  • Email notifications are sent upon process completion or in case of errors during execution.

You can add the pre-built content into your tenant and explore more details via the below link.

Link to the template in Business Accelerator Hub

 

4: Manage Employee Central Stalled Workflows

Managing stalled workflows in SAP SuccessFactors is crucial to maintain operational efficiency and ensure timely HR processes. Stalled workflows can delay critical actions such as employee onboarding, promotions or leave approvals, leading to dissatisfaction among employees and potential compliance issues. By actively managing these workflows, HR teams can identify and resolve bottlenecks, ensuring that tasks progress smoothly through the approval chain.

This proactive approach not only improves organizational agility but also enhances employee experience by reducing delays and fostering a responsive HR environment that supports business continuity effectively.

This pre-built content manages stalled workflows in Employee Central by getting input from the end user on what action to be performed on the stalled workflow. Upon successful completion of the process, workflow will be either declined or moved to valid approvers. This end-to-end process not only reduces manual data processing but also enhances the speed and efficiency of the business process.

SOLUTION ARCHITECTURE:

The following steps are included in Manage Employee Central Stalled Workflows template:

  1. Read Operation: Fetch pending workflows from SAP SuccessFactors with status "PENDING".
  2. Update Operation: Decline or reassign the workflow based on the selected action in SAP SuccessFactors. i.e.
    • Decline Workflow
    • Change Approver to Supervisor
    • Change Approver to Incumbent of Parent Position
  1. Email Notification: Send email to requestor/end user on:
    • Successful execution
    • Errors during execution

You can add the pre-built content into your tenant and explore more details via the below link.

Link to the template in Business Accelerator Hub

Other interesting use cases that you may want to explore in SAP Business Accelerator Hub with respect to SuccessFactors LOB are:

1: Create Permission Group

Creating permission groups with the given configuration setting is a manual task. In case there are many groups that need to be created, it is an even more tedious task which is time consuming and prone to error.

This template automates creating permission group in the SAP SuccessFactors System. It is more time-efficient for the users to upload a pre-populated excel template with the necessary data than creating permission groups individually in the SAP SuccessFactors system.

2: Job Offers Approvals

The Job Offers Approval template provides efficient solution to a time-consuming HR hiring process. It tackles a common issue faced by organizations, where delays in offer approvals can lead to extended hiring timelines. In such cases, Human Resources (HR) team often find themselves repeatedly following up with hiring managers or approvers to obtain the necessary approvals within the company's HR system.

However, with the Job Offers Approval process template, this entire procedure is simplified and made much more efficient. Approvers no longer need to go into the HR system and can instead swiftly grant their approval through an easier process. This whole workflow is initiated within the SAP Build Process Automation platform, ensuring that the offer approval process is both quick and smooth. This not only speeds up hiring but also makes HR operations smoother and less cumbersome, ultimately benefiting both the organization and the candidates involved.

entry.title: Understand CSRF handling in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
What is CSRF?

CSRF stands for Cross-Site Request Forgery. It is a type of malicious attack that tricks the victim into submitting a malicious request. It uses the identity and privileges of the victim to perform an undesired function on their behalf. For instance, this could involve changing an email address or password, or making a purchase. The attack can cause damage even if the exploited action is normally harmless because it's performed without the user's consent or knowledge.

What is the defense mechanism?

CSRF token is a security measure used in web applications to protect against CSRF attacks.

It is a unique, random value associated with a user's session and is typically embedded within a form or URL to ensure that the user is intentionally submitting the request. This token is checked by the server to verify the source of the request, preventing malicious parties from tricking a user's browser into making a request on their behalf.

This is usually taken care of by the browser from where the app is launched and accesses APIs.

CSRF tokens are mainly used for communication with the server. Before an app is allowed to execute a modify operation through an HTTP request such as POST, PUT, DELETE etc., a CSRF token is generated by the server to ensure the security of the operation.

Here is a brief process of how it is used:

  1. First, the app sends a GET request to fetch a CSRF token from the server.
  2. During the GET request, the server generates a new CSRF token and sends it back in the response headers (usually under "x-csrf-token").
  3. The app then uses this token in the header of every modification request.
  4. The server validates the CSRF token in every modifying request. If it's valid, the operation proceeds.
  5. If it's not valid or missing, the server returns a 403 (Forbidden) status, and the operation does not proceed.

In this way, the CSRF token ensures that every operation modifying data is secure, authenticated, and originated from a trusted source. It protects against CSRF attacks where an attacker might trick a victim into executing actions of the attacker's choosing.

Why do we need additional CSRF handling for SAP Build Apps?

To ensure application security, it is essential to understand and manage CSRF token use effectively, as it is crucial in preventing unwanted actions from being performed.

In SAP Build Apps because of the current architecture, extra CSRF token handling is required sometimes for end-user deployed apps with a back-end connection accessing an API indirectly (via a destination such as S/4 HANA) wherein the request to the API goes through via managed app-router.

To be more precise, all installed destinations are CSRF protected by managed app-router, by default. However, if a backend behind a destination has its own CSRF protection, you need to tell SAP Build Apps to switch off managed app-router’s CSRF protection for that specific destination.

This is because when your app is fetching the CSRF token, it will end up getting the CSRF token from managed app-router and then it will send it to backend and fail because the backend doesn’t recognize that token.

What is the consequence of not handling the CSRF in SAP Build Apps?

In this case the symptom would be that the deployed build apps fail with a 403 (forbidden) error as illustrated in one example below.

Disclaimer: As of today it is not possible to show this failure early in the Preview mode as the request handling here (and in the design time) is done via destination-proxy. So in general, no additional CSRF handling is required for design-time and preview mode.

How to overcome this issue?

To overcome this issue, we need to extend your destination (only for some backends which has it's own CSRF protection (such as S/4 Hana backends)) with the tag below to tell the Build Apps to switch off the managed app-router’s CSRF protection for that specific destination.

 

BuildApps.RequiresCsrf = true

 

This way, when your app is fetching the CSRF token, managed app-router won’t interfere and you will get the CSRF token from backend and then when you send it to backend it will work (because the backend will recognize that token).

NOTE: If the SAP Build apps is already built and deployed then we need to also rebuild and redeploy the application for this change in the destination to take effect.

Additional Reading

Refer to the SAP Systems | SAP Help Portal under the 'Adding Data Endpoints' section.

entry.title: Enterprise Automation: Deep Dive into the new Generative AI capabilities!
entry.content:
After the introduction to the topic by Thomas Volmering, I would be happy to support you with the deep dive into the AI capabilities of Enterprise Automation in this blog post.

  1. SAP Signavio which provide visibility into business processes, potential bottlenecks, root-cause analysis, and suggestions for improvement.
  2. SAP Build Process Automation which automates workflow processes and tasks with drag-and-drop simplicity using pre-built workflows, bots and connectors for SAP and non-SAP systems.
  3. SAP Integration Suite which helps to seamlessly integrate diverse capabilities available in complex IT landscapes with proven pre-built integrations, APIs, connectors, and best practices.

Generative AI in SAP Signavio

In order to leverage Large Language Models (LLMs) technologies for business processes, we introduced the concept of Large Process Models (LPM). This new concept was presented last year by Dr. Andreas Gerber, VP Head of Engineering SAP Signavio Process AI.  The idea is to go far beyond the traditional LLMs  by finetuning them and augmenting them to focus on their application in the area of business processes.  

For that, Large Process Models are combining generic LLM AI technologies with the know-how of decades of process experience around SAP from thousands of experts. They are trained with anonymized customer data from various customers and refined with domain- or industry-specific fine-tuning, and customer-specific fine-tuning. This broad and diverse training set helps ensure that our process AI capabilities are uniquely equipped to tackle real-world business and process challenges with precision, drawing on deep industry knowledge and process understanding. 

Our LPM-powered process AI capabilities have the exceptional ability to answer your specific process questions and help you uncover issues you were not aware of. They act as your trusted advisor, providing you with ready-to-consume AI-powered recommendations you can apply right away or use as a foundation to drive process enhancements. 

Upcoming capabilities in SAP Signavio powered by GenAI  leveraging Large Process Models will be:

Process Recommender 

Our AI-assisted process recommender ​will provide process and domain owners with the ability to obtain preconfigured process models that are a best match to their needs, based on a database of 5,000 best practices. ​

With this capability, you will narrow down thousands of options to those process models that best suit the needs of your organization. ​

Recommendations are grounded in years of SAP experience working side by side with industry leaders and thousands of projects delivered. ​

Planned for Q3 2024, Process Recommender will bring key benefits such as: ​

  • Instant recommendations based on best practices ​
  • Accelerated process model design ​
  • No need for consulting-heavy services to define the first process draft to start the modeling activity

 

Performance Indicators Recommender

Our AI-assisted Performance Indicators Recommender ​capability will provide process owners and process analysts instant recommendations on the process performance indicators to be monitored.

Users can move from problem identification to a measurement approach with no effort by leveraging a repository of thousands KPIs and PPIs

Key benefits of Performance Indicators Recommender, to be available in Q3 2024, include: ​

  • Instant recommendations based on best practices ​
  • Simple connection between business problem, affected process and relevant metric to be measured
  •  Self-service approach to define initial process monitoring framework

SAP Signavio Process Analyzer

 Our AI-assisted Process Analyzer, empowers users with any skillset to ask questions in natural language and receive immediate insights that can inform business decisions.

Key Benefits ​of this new module, scheduled for Q4 2024, include:

  • Correlation and anomaly detection easily consumable by business users ​
  • Democratized process mining ​
  • Accuracy and reliability and relevance of the analysis output based on business user prompts  ​

 

 

Generative AI in SAP Build Process Automation, with Executable Process AI

Our aim for Process Automation is to go further, and we now want to provide Executable Process AI and more.

Indeed, there are challenges when automating processes:

  • No active assistance to business experts while starting automation of critical processes
  • Slow pace of incrementing large process automation​
  • Difficulty to comprehend already modelled artifacts when lacking adequate documentation

To tackle these challenges, we decided that SAP Build Process Automation should include

  • Conversational AI capabilities within the studio
  • Semantic data access and knowledge graph access within automation and process design time
  • Auto-generation of automations and process segments based on embedded intelligence within the studio

6 months ago, at SAP TechEd 2023, we unveiled a first demo of Joule copilot creating the workflow for an approval process. You can see in this video a preview of how generative AI will help creating a new process workflow automation, with a business rule based on a decision table for approval.

Our solution, SAP Build Process Automation, will soon bring embedded generative AI capabilities to generate processes, automations, and decisions, including:

  • Interactive Model Generation and Modifications
  • Summarization of Complex Artifacts in natural language

With Artifacts Generation and Modification, you will be able to describe your process in natural language, interact and iterate to finalize desired process flow and finally generate the process that fits your requirement. It will generate processes, automations, forms, and decisions (business policies) using the inputs provided by business expert in natural language. And of course, generated artifacts which can be reviewed and modified as per need.

Summarization will create a short or comprehensive description of complex historical or newly generated complex artifacts, for instance the summary of a complex decision table. You will be able to share or save the description along with the artifact.

In a few words, SAP Build Process Automation will bring tremendous benefits to our customers, by

  • offering a conversational experience for citizen developers
  • accelerating time to value for authoring automations and processes
  • standardizing SAP application access for automations through a semantic access layer fostering reuse and fail-safe connectivity

These evolutions are planned for Q3 2024, and you can discover all the improvements planned in Process Automation by browsing SAP Build Process Automation public roadmap.

 

Generative AI in SAP Integration Suite

Integration, the foundation of an intelligent enterprise, is becoming the number one strategic priority for organizations. Only by connecting customer, product, employee, and brand experiences with business operations, continuously and in real time, can organizations exploit the full potential of their system landscape and make the right decision at the right time. With SAP Integration Suite, you can integrate solutions inside and outside your data center. You can accelerate connectivity with prebuilt integration flows, connectors to hundreds of systems, thousands of APIs, and other capabilities that simplify integrations with SAP and third-party applications. As shown in the figure, connecting people in real time becomes a reality with event- driven architectures and intelligent technology that helps you automate comprehensive business processes to gain efficiency and visibility.

There are a few AI-based capabilities in SAP Integration Suite already, such as a conversational assistant in SAP Business Accelerator Hub (beta), flow step recommendations, and recommendations for interfaces and mappings.

Now we are working to further integrate AI for 2 purposes:

  • Generation of Integration
  • Anomaly Detection

Generation of Integration

Our customers are facing complex integration challenges with the diverse applications and systems in their landscape. Integrators must have the right domain & technical expertise and invest a lot of time and effort to design new integrations & APIs.

Our solution is to leverage AI to generate Integrations: SAP Integration Site will be able to create new integration flows, based on the specific integration scenarios, different connecting applications, and business partners. It will leveraging Unified Customer Landscape – UCL - to discover the customer landscape and offer seamless integrations between those systems, and provide pre-configured connectors and scheduler.

 

Anomaly Detection

It is important to monitor deviations from the normal usage or performance in the API traffic, as it indicates security threats, system malfunctions or other issues that hinder developer & user experience.

Empowering our customers to maintain security, reliability & performance of their APIs, we will leverage AI for anomaly detection, identifying unusual or abnormal behaviors by continuously monitoring the API traffic. This AI-based mechanism will immediately notify API owners upon detection of anomalies in API Call Volume, API Error count, API Response time, while providing insights to aid investigate the cause & analyze impact and recommend remedial actions.

Watch the demo of Integration Suite new AI capabilities during Juergen Mueller's Innovation Keynote at SAP Sapphire 2024:

Click on the image to watch the video.

Thus, SAP Integration Suite will enable organizations to deliver better services & experience and hence achieve their business goals.

 

Demos of advanced Enterprise Automation at SAP Sapphire 2024

On June 4th at SAP Sapphire 2024, SAP CTO Juergen Mueller showcased an end-to-end demo of Enterprise Automation, in the context of extending SAP ERP in compliance with our Clean Core strategy:

Click on the image to watch the video.

First, new SAP Signavio Benchmarking Analytics presents a comprehensive dashboard of the business processes, called Process Performance Overview, which shows that the Lead to Cash process does not perform as well as it could. In particular, the analysis shows that many sales orders involve a manual step because delivery block is not removed after a customer pays an overdue bill.

Second, by using the new Build Extension Wizard embedded in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, one creates a new extension project:  a Business Event, occurring when a Journal Entry is created, triggers an automation created with SAP Build Process Automation which automatically removes the delivery block after the overdue bill is finally paid by the customer. That’s it!

Now, let us look into the other business scenario in more details: how can enterprise automation support us in intelligent processing of blocked sales orders.

This demo features the incremental value of all three components within the enterprise automation portfolio and highlights the latest advancements and innovative AI-based features that were added to SAP Build Process Automation, SAP Signavio, and SAP Integration Suite.

We start this use case with SAP Signavio Process Insights, where we can evaluate the entire process landscape and identify inefficiencies in the lead-to-cash line of business. We continue with a deep dive to the processes to identify the highest improvement potential. This analysis is supported by SAP Signavio Process AI, which is being used for intelligent language prompts, allowing us to find the right BPMN model and search for KPIs.

Next, we receive the recommendation that we have a very low automation rate for processing sales order documents that have a billing block attached to it. To solve the problem and automate the process, we jump to the SAP S/4HANA Extension Wizard, allowing us to create needed extensions, in this case to define and initiate a process in SAP Build.

Event Mesh service from the integration suite is being used to facilitate the event-based communications.

In SAP Build Process Automation, we can leverage executable process AI capability, allowing us to design the needed approval flow for the sales order. In this scenario, we will define a new business rule to process sales orders differently, which are exceeding a certain order amount. We can also use the executable process AI functionality to ask for a process summary.

With the help of this, we will be able to remove the billing block and then unblock the sales order.

Next, we can also use actions to trigger integration flows in SAP Integration Suite. The extensive library of connectors and adapters allows us to replicate sales order information into any SAP or third-party application, that is required. In this case, we use the embedded AI functionality to describe the integration that we need, which is going to be generated fully automatically. In this case, this integration flow will be used to replicate the sales order document via a SOAP adapter.

On top of that, with the AI-based anomaly detection in API management, we can also detect failures and analyze the entire API traffic to ensure operational excellence.

Finally, advanced event mesh takes care of high-volume event handling in multiple regions.

So, as you can see, Enterprise Automation suite with SAP Signavio, SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Integration Suite is now more powerful than ever. Up to you now to harness this power to improve the efficiency of your business!

entry.title: Harness the Power of Generative AI for Enterprise Automation!
entry.content:
In a previous blog post, I presented the benefits of Enterprise Automation through the success stories from two very different customers, Blue Diamond Growers and Homemade. This gave you a first glimpse of how Enterprise Automation can quickly increase business efficiency in any organization.

Demo of advanced Enterprise Automation at SAP Sapphire 2024

At SAP Sapphire 2024, SAP CTO Juergen Mueller showcased a demo of Enterprise Automation, in the context of extending SAP S/4HANA Cloud in compliance with SAP’s Clean Core strategy:


Click the image to watch the Enterprise Automation demo

First, new SAP Signavio Benchmarking Analytics presents a comprehensive dashboard of the business processes, called Process Performance Overview, which shows that the Lead to Cash process does not perform as well as it could. In particular, the analysis shows that many sales orders involve a manual step because delivery block is not removed after a customer pays an overdue bill.

Second, by using the upcoming new Build Extension Wizard embedded in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, one creates a new extension project:  a Business Event, occurring when a Journal Entry is created, triggers an automation created with SAP Build Process Automation which automatically removes the delivery block after the overdue bill is finally paid by the customer.

That’s it!

The Future of Enterprise Automation is AI-driven

You’ve read that our customer Homemade is using an SAP Business AI service named Document Information Extraction to read documents and automatically enter the data captured from those documents into their systems. This is a very common use case for applying AI to business processes that many of our customers are already using. And we know that we can go much further in process automation by using Generative AI. That's why we've been working hard for several months to add GenAI capabilities to the 3 pillars that make up our Enterprise Automation suite:

  1. SAP Signavio which provide visibility into business processes, potential bottlenecks, root-cause analysis, and suggestions for improvement.
  2. SAP Build Process Automation which automates workflow processes and tasks with drag-and-drop simplicity using pre-built workflows, bot automations and connectors for SAP and non-SAP systems.
  3. SAP Integration Suite which helps to seamlessly integrate diverse capabilities available in complex IT landscapeswith proven pre-built integrations, APIs, connectors, and best practices.

I’m happy to share today an overview of this new capabilities powered by Generative AI.

For a comprehensive deep dive, I engage you to read Evgeniy Gorbunov’s blog post “Enterprise Automation: Deep Dive on new Generative AI capabilities”. 💡

Generative AI in SAP Signavio

To efficiently leverage Large Language Models (LLMs) technologies for business processes, our colleagues from SAP Signavio introduced last year the concept of Large Process Models (LPM). The idea is to go far beyond the traditional LLMs by finetuning them and augmenting them to focus on their application in the area of business processes. 

 Read more in the blog post written by Dr. Andreas Gerber, VP Head of Engineering SAP Signavio Process AI: “Large Process Models: Process Management in the Age of Generative AI”.

Upcoming capabilities in SAP Signavio powered by GenAI leveraging Large Process Models will be:

  • Process Recommender: our AI-assisted process recommender ​will provide process and domain owners with the ability to obtain preconfigured process models that are a best match to their needs, based on a database of 5,000 best practices. With this capability, you will narrow down thousands of options to those process models that best suit the needs of your organization. ​
  • Performance Indicators Recommender:  this ​capability will provide process owners and process analysts instant recommendations on the process performance indicators to be monitored. Users can move from problem identification to a measurement approach with no effort by leveraging a repository of thousands KPIs and PPIs
  • Process Analyzer: this capability empowers users with any skillset to ask questions in natural language and receive immediate insights that can inform business decisions.

Generative AI in SAP Build Process Automation, with Executable Process AI

Our aim for Process Automation is to go further, and we now want to provide Executable Process AI and more. Indeed, there are challenges when automating processes:

  • No active assistance to business experts while starting automation of critical processes
  • Slow pace of incrementing large process automation​
  • Difficulty to comprehend already modelled artifacts when lacking adequate documentation

To tackle these challenges, we decided that SAP Build Process Automation should include

  • Conversational AI capabilities within the studio
  • Auto-generation of automations and process segments based on embedded intelligence within the studio

Our solution, SAP Build Process Automation, will soon bring embedded generative AI capabilities to generate processes, automations, and decisions, including:

  • Interactive Process Generation and Modifications: you will be able to describe your process in natural language, to interact and iterate to finalize desired process flow and finally generate the process with automations, forms, and decisions (business policies) that fits your requirement.

 

  • Summarization of Complex Artifacts: this capability will create a short comprehensive description of complex historical or newly generated complex artifacts, for instance the summary of a complex decision table.

In a few words, SAP Build Process Automation will bring tremendous benefits to our customers, by

  • offering a conversational experience for citizen developers
  • accelerating time to value for authoring automations and processes
  • standardizing SAP application access for automations through a semantic access layer fostering reuse and fail-safe connectivity

These evolutions are planned to be available in 2024, and you can discover all the improvements planned in Process Automation by browsing SAP Build Process Automation public roadmap.

Generative AI in SAP Integration Suite

Integration is the foundation of an intelligent enterprise: only by connecting customers, products, employees and brand experiences with business operations, continuously and in real time, can organizations exploit the full potential of their system landscape and make the right decision at the right time.

With SAP Integration Suite, you can integrate solutions inside and outside your data center. You can accelerate connectivity with prebuilt integration flows, connectors to hundreds of systems, thousands of APIs, and other capabilities that simplify integrations with SAP and third-party applications. There are a few AI-based capabilities in SAP Integration Suite already, such as a conversational assistant in SAP Business Accelerator Hub (beta), flow step recommendations, and recommendations for interfaces and mappings.

Now we are working to further integrate AI for 2 purposes:

  • Generation of Integration: this new capability can create new integration flows, based on the specific integration scenarios, different connecting applications, and business partners. It will be leveraging Unified Customer Landscape – UCL - to discover the customer landscape and offer seamless integrations between those systems and provide pre-configured connectors and scheduler.
  • Anomaly Detection: we will leverage AI for anomaly detection, identifying unusual or abnormal behaviors by continuously monitoring the API traffic. This AI-based mechanism will immediately notify API owners upon detection of anomalies in API Call Volume, API Error count, API Response time, while providing insights to aid investigate the cause & analyze impact and recommend remedial actions.

So, as you can see, Enterprise Automation suite with SAP Signavio, SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Integration Suite will be more powerful than ever. Up to you now to harness this power to improve the efficiency of your business!

One more thing? Joule Extensibility in SAP Build!

In addition to Enterprise Automation, there is another amazing perspective involving SAP Build that I’m very proud to share with you: indeed, SAP Build will be the go-to low code extension layer for Joule, enabling customers to extend Joule by creating custom skills using advanced GenAI capabilities.​

Here is the announcement of Joule Extensibility with a demo shown by Juergen Mueller in his Innovation keynote:


Click the image to view the Joule extensibility demo

The benefits of Joule Extensibility through SAP Build for our customers and partners will be to

  • Provide support to business users in ad-hoc scenarios
  • Enhance collaboration and innovation across the SAP ecosystem
  • Reduce redundancy and leverage collective expertise to enhance business processes
  • Streamline the integration process, saving time and resources
  • To let customers stay ahead of the curve with access to the latest AI capabilities

Stay tuned to see how Joule and SAP Business AI can help you leverage artificial intelligence to improve your business efficiency!

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation Pre-built content for Procurement Use cases
entry.content:
The definition of pre-built content, how it helps your business to jump-start your automation development and how to discover them is explained in the blog, ‘Accelerate Business Process Development with SAP Build Process Automation Pre-Built Content’ 

This blog covers the pre-built content for Procurement use cases, specifically. 

SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement is a cloud-based procurement solution that enables companies to align their procurement processes on one platform. With standardized and pre-configured capabilities, you can adapt solutions to meet the unique needs of any organization. Machine learning analytics, real-time insights, and advanced functionalities enable businesses to analyse spending and risk, make informed decisions, and simplify sourcing, purchasing, and payments.  

Though SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement solution offers various solutions for widely used procurement operations across the industries, there are some features that must be extended with BTP with side-by-side extension approach to solve customer requirements.
